zh.lifeSummary: 當Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé於1070年出生在法國時，他的父親Geoffroi de la Guerche38歲，母親F De La Guerche34歲。他與Basilla de la Guerche結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1121年在英國英格蘭享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé于1070年出生在法国时，他的父亲Geoffroi de la Guerche38岁，母亲F De La Guerche34岁。他与Basilla de la Guerche结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1121年在英国英格兰享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Pierre, Andre, Marcel, Gaston, Jacques, Michel, Francois, Emile, Fernand, Monique, Normand.
French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + hari, heri ‘army’ (see Walter ). Compare Gautier and also Authier , Gokey , and Gosha .
Altered form of French   Gonthier  .

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Guthier
meanings: German: probably an altered form of French   Gauthier  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Gosha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Angelle, Mechelle, Monique.
Americanized form of French   Gauthier  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German   Gosche  .

variants.name: Gautier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Antoine, Francois, Marcel, Pascale, Philippe, Remy, Thierry.  Spanish Jose, Jorge, Miguel, Adelina, Altagracia, Ana, Andres, Arnaldo, Artemio, Augusto, Carlos, Edilberto.
French: variant of   Gauthier  . This surname is also found in Spain (mainly Cádiz) and in the Dominican Republic. Compare   Gootee  .
History: This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Gokey
meanings: Americanized form of French Gauthier . Alteration of the French ending -thier to English -key is typical for American French surnames.

variants.name: Gaudreau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Marcel, Armand, Fernand, Michel, Adrien, Andre, Celine, Donat, Euclide, Gaetane, Germaine.

French: derivative of the old personal name Gaudier, which is of the same origin as Gauthier 1. The surname Gaudreau, a cognate of Gautreau , is rare in France; it is found mainly in Indre-et-Loire. Compare Gaudreault , Godreau , Goodreau , Goodro , Goodroe , Goodrow , and Goudreau .

History: Gilles Gaudreau/Gotreau from La Flotte in Charente-Maritime, France, married Anne Pineau in Sainte-Famille, Île d'Orléans, QC, in 1671. Jean Gaudreau/Gotreau from La Flotte in Charente-Maritime, France, married Marie Roy in Quebec City, QC, in 1679.

variants.name: Gautreau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Amedee, Ancil, Armand, Camille, Lucien, Marcel, Normand, Remi.
French: derivative of the personal name   Gauthier   1 and hence a cognate of   Gaudreau  . Compare   Gauthreaux   and   Gautreaux  .

variants.name: Gualtieri
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Rocco, Antonio, Deno, Rosario, Agostino, Angelo, Carmine, Claudio, Dino, Domenic, Domenico, Egidio, Fernando, Francesco, Gregorio, Jose, Orlando, Ricardo, Roberto, Ubaldo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Gualtiero, composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + hari, heri ‘army’. Compare Gauthier , Walter .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Hay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a male name this is generally a short form of Bailey , although it is sometimes used as an independent first name. As a female name it is likely to be, at least in part, a transferred use from the various plants known as bay (Old French baie, Latin baca, earlier bacca, ‘berry’). These are similar to the laurels ( see Laurel ) and the leaves of several species are used as flavouring agents ( compare Juniper and Cinnamon ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé was born in 1070, in France, his father, Geoffroi de la Guerche, was 38 and his mother, F De La Guerche, was 34. He married Basilla de la Guerche. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1121, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé est né en 1070, à France, son père, Geoffroi de la Guerche, avait 38 ans et sa mère, F De La Guerche, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Basilla de la Guerche. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1121, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé 1070 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroi de la Guerche 38 und seine Mutter F De La Guerche 34. Er hat Basilla de la Guerche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1121 im Alter von 51 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé è nato il nel 1070 nel Francia, il suo padre, Geoffroi de la Guerche, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, F De La Guerche, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Basilla de la Guerche. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1121, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancéが1070年にフランスで生まれた時，父Geoffroi de la Guercheは38歳，母F De La Guercheは34歳であった。Basilla de la Guercheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1121年にイギリスイギリスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé(이)가 1070년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroi de la Guerche(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 F De La Guerche(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Basilla de la Guerche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1121년 영국 잉글랜드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé nasceu em 1070, em França, seu pai, Geoffroi de la Guerche, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, F De La Guerche, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Basilla de la Guerche. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1121, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé родился в 1070 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroi de la Guerche было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали F De La Guerche, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Basilla de la Guerche. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1121 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé nació en 1070, en Francia, su papá, Geoffroi de la Guerche, tenía 38 años y su mamá, F De La Guerche, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Basilla de la Guerche. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1121, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
